creator: dv@v-gal.com
text:
Some times I have a KERNEL PANIC while destroying VLANs with traffic.
There are more than 250 VLANs configured on one interface (lagg) with over 1.2 Gbit traffic (via lagg interface, not only one VLAN).
I can't collect a lot of information, because this system is in production, and when it happens, there are only few seconds to make a reboot and restart the system.
Maybe it was fixed in new versions of FreeBSD.
I hope that maintainers can check this somehow. Or probably anyone who has the same problem will reply here.
